creator: yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
"Akinori MUSHA" <knu@iDaemons.org> wrote:
> >  > - The RCS tag you put for the first import is $FreeBSD$, not $FreeBSD: $.
> >  
> >  and, there is another trap ;-) when there is no "$FreeBSD: $" line :
> >  
> >      FATAL: no $FreeBSD$ line in Makefile comment section.
> >  
> >  Isn't it a bug of portlint?

> Try portlint -N when you are going to check a new port.

portlint -N with $FreeBSD: $ causes the following warning:

WARN: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make CVS happy.

(portlint -N with $FreeBSD$ causes no warning.)
-- 
Yoichi Nakayama <yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp>
